title: diospyros juruensis subsp. campechiana
intro: Diospyros juruensis subsp. campechiana is a plant species belonging to the family Ebenaceae, native to Mexico and Central America, and is a subspecies of the Diospyros juruensis tree. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Diospyros juruensis subsp. campechiana include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Diospyros juruensis subsp. campechiana is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to release its herbal properties, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical and cosmetic products.
